sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in sources

special_mechanics.name: Color Power-ups (Mighty Coins)
special_mechanics.description: Jack can transform into three colors via Mighty Coins: blue (opens orange treasure chests), orange (opens any treasure chest by touching), green (transforms all enemies into coins for 5 seconds)

special_mechanics.name: Secret Passages
special_mechanics.description: Activated by finding a Sphinx in visible or hidden treasure chests; grants level warping

special_mechanics.name: Torture Room Punishment
special_mechanics.description: Automatically triggered if player obtains more than 9 Mighty Coins or 99 seconds on timer; requires completing countdown jumps to escape

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative). Sources describe gameplay mechanics and level structure but contain no quantified physics parameters. No ROM addresses or hex values documented. Movement and gravity values not empirically measured or published.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Mighty Bomb Jack
